name: css-landing-page
title: Landing Page
description: A landing page is a single, focused web page that people "land on" when following a link. Unlike a full website with lots of sections, a landing page usually has one clear purpose, like introducing a project and guiding visitors towards specific actions. This template's guide also introduces most of the core concepts in modern CSS, so it also serves as a thorough introduction.

start-guide.template:
{{h1}}

Welcome to my landing page! Take a look at my recent projects and interests below, and feel free to connect with me using the social links at the bottom.

working on this really into this
